title: Grin Change Maker
short_description: Give a VERY impatient goat correct change in the fewest coins — before it eats your shop.
description: You run the Grin General Store and your only customer is a goat with zero patience. Work out the change (payment minus price) and hand it over in the fewest grin coins — wrong change or slow service and the goat starts eating your inventory. Grade bands ramp from whole grin to full decimals. Teaches subtraction, money and optimization with fewest-coin and speed bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap. Tap coins to give them, tap a given coin to take it back, then press Hand it over.
